subcodes.first_line: Verily, We make mention of those who have turned their faces towards the Countenance, and We strengthen them in that wherein they stand firm - the love of God and the Manifestation of His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر الذین توجهوا الی الوجه و نویدهم علی ما هم علیه من حب الله و مظهر امره
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital
